notes:
Archetype stage: early_maps
Kinetic Blast Elementalist early maps setup focused on fast elemental clear and smooth wand mapping.
Applied changes:
- Set class=Witch ascendancy=Elementalist
- Set level=92
- Selected tree 'update'
- Selected primary skill group containing 'Kinetic Blast'
- Set main skill to Kinetic Blast in group 1
- Set movement group 3 to: Shield Charge, Faster Attacks, Frostblink
- Set config enemyLevel=83
- Set config conditionEnemyChilled=True
- Set config conditionEnemyIgnited=True
- Set config conditionEnemyShocked=True
- Set config usePowerCharges=True
- Set config useFrenzyCharges=True
